dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4336 IS: Restoring Rights of Medical Residents Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Lee introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend the Pension Funding Equity Act of 2004 to repeal the antitrust exemption applicable to graduate medical resident matching programs.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Restoring Rights of Medical Residents Act.
Section 207 of the Pension Funding Equity Act of 2004 (15 U.S.C. 37B) is repealed.
This Act, and the amendment made by this Act, shall take effect on the March 18 that first occurs after the date of enactment of this Act.
